description: Gold-set of 30 sanitized-client-confidential prompts. Each prompt lists the PII categories that MUST be detected by analyze(). Used by tests/goldSetValidation.test.mjs to measure Phase 6 detection recall. Labels are conservative — only categories that must trigger are listed; analyzer may flag additional contextual spans (extra spans do not penalize recall).

prompts.text: Our client Maria Esperanza transferred her home to her son Daniel Esperanza in 2021.
Client SSN 123-45-6789 and DOB 03-14-1953 are on file.
Contact Ms. Larkin at 415-555-0123 or larkin@example.com about the deposition.
The property address is 2155 Vallejo Street, San Francisco CA 94123.
FEIN 27-3318822 belongs to Hudson Construction.
Client's driver license D1234567 was used for identification.
MRN 00123456 at the Stanford Medical Center shows the prior surgery.
Matter code DE-2025-001234 relates to the Esperanza trust.
Card 4111 1111 1111 1111 was used for the retainer payment.
Account number 123456789012 at Wells Fargo held the settlement funds.
My client John Smith was born 7/4/1972 and lives in Sacramento.
The trustee, Marcus Chen, administered the estate with SSN 542-87-1199.
Please depose decedent's widow Anne Holbrook next Tuesday at 10am.
Defendant Vega Steel (FEIN 45-9988123) breached the subcontract.
Reach Dr. Patel at (213) 555-8888 for the expert opinion.
Her email alice.brown+work@legal.io bounced; try 323-555-0199 instead.
The petitioner Janet Ortiz filed on 10/15/2024.
Opposing party's address is 742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield CA 97477.
Routing 021000021 from the trust account was used by mistake.
Conservatee Martha Chen resides at 100 Main Street.
My settlor, Ellis Parker, set up the revocable trust in 2018.
Check card 5500-0000-0000-0004 on record; expires next year.
Spouse's name is Brenda Okafor; DOB 2/22/1980.
Attorney referred to as Mr. O'Neill represents the adverse party.
The FEIN for our client corp is 12-3456789 and its address is 500 Market Street.
Prior counsel's email lisa.chen@oldfirm.com is still on the service list.
The new matter FF-2026-042 involves my client Richard Vega.
SSN 999-88-7777, CA driver license L0987654, and phone 916-555-1212 belong to the ward.
Client Alicia Foster was injured on 06/30/2023 at 1050 Sansome Street, SF CA 94111-2045.
The executor David Kim-Hayes can be reached at david.kim@hayes-law.example.
